evals.prompt: I want to build a full-stack app using Express + React with a PostgreSQL database and REST API.
evals.expected_output: A detailed architectural plan and checklist for setting up a full-stack app using Express + React with a PostgreSQL database and REST API.
assertions: The response should include project structure, API client approach, auth strategy, real-time method, and error handling decisions.
The response should include a checklist for scaffolding with the specified stack.
The response should include a summary of what was built, how to run it, and key files to know about.

evals.prompt: I need to create a CRUD app using Next.js API and MongoDB with JWT authentication.
evals.expected_output: A detailed architectural plan and checklist for setting up a CRUD app using Next.js API and MongoDB with JWT authentication.
assertions: The response should include project structure, API client approach, auth strategy, real-time method, and error handling decisions.
The response should include a checklist for scaffolding with the specified stack.
The response should include a summary of what was built, how to run it, and key files to know about.

evals.prompt: I am building a real-time chat app using WebSocket and Go backend.
evals.expected_output: A detailed architectural plan and checklist for setting up a real-time chat app using WebSocket and Go backend.
assertions: The response should include project structure, API client approach, auth strategy, real-time method, and error handling decisions.
The response should include a checklist for scaffolding with the specified stack.
The response should include a summary of what was built, how to run it, and key files to know about.

evals.prompt: I want to implement error handling for a REST API using Express.
evals.expected_output: A detailed guide on implementing error handling for a REST API using Express.
assertions: The response should include a description of the typed error hierarchy.
The response should include a global error handler middleware.
The response should include examples of how to handle different types of errors.

evals.prompt: I need to set up file uploads using a presigned URL in a React app.
evals.expected_output: A detailed guide on setting up file uploads using a presigned URL in a React app.
assertions: The response should include a description of the presigned URL pattern.
The response should include an example of how to generate a presigned URL on the backend.
The response should include an example of how to upload a file using the presigned URL on the frontend.
